title: "Stay Safe": UK Cops Warn Of Unrest In Belfast Over "Hit List" Of Migrants
summary_full: Police warned that those creating or sharing the list could be committing a criminal offence and deployed 200 additional officers to help prevent further violence.
summary_public: Police warned that those creating or sharing the list could be committing a criminal offence and deployed 200 additional officers to help prevent further violence.
